articles.title: AI-PROOF YOUR CAREER FOR TOMORROW
articles.summary: Will AI replace tech jobs or will your job evolve? Is it too late to switch to a career in AI/ML? If not, where do you start? What AI skills should you build?

articles.title: ELON LAUNCHES X.AI
articles.summary: More details included about the secretive safety start up. Mostly we get to see who is on the team and working to help this venture. The stated goal is to “understand the universe”. We are interested to see how this plays out.

articles.title: CLIBRAIN LAUNCHES LINCE
articles.summary: Clibrain, a Spanish AI startup, has launched Lince Zero, a large language model optimized for Spanish. The model, available under open-source license, is aimed at delivering enhanced performance for Spanish language queries.

articles.title: SHUTTERSTOCK EXPANDS DEAL WITH OPENAI TO BUILD GENERATIVE AI TOOLS
articles.summary: Shutterstock is expanding its partnership with OpenAI, providing data to train AI models in return for advanced tech access. The move comes despite industry debates over generative AI and copyright issues.

articles.title: ENHANCED CHATGPT CONVERSATIONS
articles.summary: This study proposes a method to improve the functionality of chatbot systems like ChatGPT by using ontology-driven structured prompts that allow for more effective information retrieval and response generation. By showcasing its effectiveness in the Ukrainian language within rehabilitation, the study illustrates that this approach is adaptable and can be applied to a variety of other large language models.

articles.title: AN AI TOOL FOR VISUALIZING AND ANSWERING SURGICAL QUESTIONS
articles.summary: This paper presents CAT-ViL, a deep learning tool that can provide detailed answers and visualize them on surgical videos, serving as a valuable resource for medical students and junior surgeons.

articles.title: CONVERTING TEXT DESCRIPTIONS INTO ARTISTIC CINEMAGRAPHS
articles.summary: A new automated system, Text2Cinemagraph, can transform text descriptions into moving artistic images called cinemagraphs, even when the text includes imaginary elements and stylistic details.

articles.title: AI COMPANION APP
articles.summary: a16z released an AI companion app starter kit.

articles.title: GPT RESEARCHER
articles.summary: GPT Researcher is an autonomous agent designed for comprehensive online research on a variety of tasks.

articles.title: REFLEXION
articles.summary: This repo holds the code, demos, and logs for Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning.

articles.title: THE BUILDING BLOCKS OF GENERATIVE AI
articles.summary: This blog post discusses the "Picks & Shovels" behind Generative AI leaders like OpenAI. The post covers topics like foundational models, compute, frameworks, orchestration & vector databases, fine-tuning, labeling, synthetic data, AI observability, and model safety.

articles.title: THE RISKS OF AI ARE REAL BUT MANAGEABLE
articles.summary: Bill Gates discusses the real but manageable risks of AI, making the case that we’ve successfully mitigated the risks from past innovations.

articles.title: INSIDE THE WHITE-HOT CENTER OF AI DOOMERISM
articles.summary: A profile into Anthropic’s efforts to simultaneously balance competition with a desire to build safe AI models.

articles.title: FEARING THE WRONG THING
articles.summary: Mike Loukides argues that the only thing to fear is failing to make the transition to AI-assisted programming.

articles.title: DATA AND COMPUTE ARE THE ULTIMATE FLYWHEEL
articles.summary: This article discusses the commercial ecosystem that is emerging around data in the age of AI. It argues that new pricing and usage models, compliance and data rights, and data marketplaces are needed to update the current system.
